# Stocks Portfolio Review — 2026-06-30
**Book: $547,901 (77 positions) | Horizon: 1–2yr | Profile: crypto-bullish, cyclical/dividend OK**
*Educational analysis, not financial advice. Single names are satellites; the index is the bar.*

## TOP RECAP
The single most important action is to **TRIM COIN from 22.7% to ~10% of the book (~$71k, ~470 shares)** — a −50% move in COIN today erases 11.4% of your entire portfolio; this is a position-sizing emergency, not a bet against crypto (Ark is still accumulating COIN). The second-highest-impact lever is **TRIM NEM ~35% (~$16k)**: gold is down 12% this month as a hawkish new Warsh Fed unwinds the "debasement trade," and your crypto + gold + silver + uranium hard-asset basket is a single concentrated macro bet (~30%+ of book) right as that trade reverses. Redeploy proceeds first into **META (ADD, cheapest mega-cap at PEG 0.81 with 62% earnings growth)** and keep meaningful dry powder for better entries in a risk-off tape.

**Market narrative:** Hawkish-opacity Warsh Fed + 3.4% PCE is unwinding the debasement trade (gold/BTC down, USD up) and rotating equity money from the Mag7 into AI chipmakers; the next FOMC is a binary hold-or-hike overhang.

## MACRO REGIME
- Warsh Fed held 3.50–3.75%, refused forward guidance; PCE +3.4% y/y (5th yr >target). [axios 2026-06-26]
- DXY up (SCOTUS blocked Cook firing); yen at 162, 40-yr low, intervention watch. [wsj 2026-06-30]
- Dow record >52,000, GOOG added; Mag7 shed $2.3tn, rotation into AI chipmakers. [wsj/ft 2026-06-29/30]
- **Debasement trade unwinding: gold −12% MTD, BTC down, USD up.** [wsj 2026-06-30]
- MicroStrategy abandons "never sell BTC," plans BTC sales to outlast crypto winter. [wsj 2026-06-30]

### HOLD* — capped (hard-asset/debasement cluster)
GDX/PHYS/PSLV/URNM + NEM(post-trim) + crypto: cap total debasement basket at **20% of book**. The NEM trim is the highest-impact single lever.

## PORTFOLIO STRUCTURE VERDICT
The book's biggest structural risk is a **single concentrated macro bet**: crypto (COIN+HOOD+CRCL+BTC ≈ 26%) and precious-metals/uranium (NEM+GDX+PHYS+PSLV+URNM ≈ 17%) are both expressions of the *same* "currency-debasement / hard-asset" thesis — ~40%+ of the book moving together — exactly as that trade unwinds (gold −12% MTD, BTC down, USD up). A hawkish-Fed week could compress all of them simultaneously. The single action that reduces this most: **trim COIN to 10% and NEM to 5.5%**, then redeploy into uncorrelated quality growth (META) and hold dry powder.

## CASH DEPLOYMENT PRIORITY
1. **META** — $5–8k (best PEG, deepest-depressed quality growth).
2. **HOOD** — ~$8k (keeps crypto tilt, diversified, technical timing).
3. **Dry powder ~$90k** — hold in GSY/cash; the debasement unwind may drag crypto/gold lower → cheaper re-add. Optionally drip into core RSP/VOO on weakness (equal-weight RSP preferred to dodge Mag7 over-valuation).

## HONEST BASE RATE
Only 1 of 10 investable stock-selection methods beat SPY on return and 0 of 10 on Sharpe (analyse-fundamental backtests). Single names are satellites; the index is the bar. These panels are hypotheses — any mechanical entry/trim rule must clear strategy-discovery-backtest (full costs, walk-forward) before risking capital. yfinance fundamentals are point-in-time unsafe (fine for current entry, never for backtesting).
